QW-403  BASE METALS. (a) Base metals are assigned to P-Numbers in accordance with the groupings of this paragraph. (b) Qualification on a base metal in one P-Number group qualifies for other base metals within the same group, subject to the limitations of QW-250 for procedure qualification and QW-350 for performance qualification. (c) When joining different P-Numbers, the procedure shall be qualified as required by QW-202, unless exempted by this paragraph for certain combinations. Material identification shall comply with UG-81. For carbon steel specifications, refer to UCS-100. See also QW-404 for filler metal groupings.
